title: ESIC Kolkata Teaching Faculty Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for 27 Posts
shortInfo: The Ex-Servicemen Contributory Health Scheme (ECHS) has officially announced the Medical Officer and Non Medical Staffs Recruitment 2026 with 14 openings. The detailed notification was published at ECHS Official Website. Candidates who meet the age criteria of maximum 66 years for Medical Officer and maximum 53/56 years for other posts and hold qualifications such as MBBS, Graduate, Class I Clerical Trade, 10+2 with Science, or Diploma in Dental Hygienist/Dental Mechanic Course can now submit their offline applications up to 02 June 2026. Direct links to download the notification and apply off

basic_details.post_name: Teaching Faculty for Super Specialty Department
basic_details.short_information: The Ex-Servicemen Contributory Health Scheme (ECHS) has officially announced the Medical Officer and Non Medical Staffs Recruitment 2026 with 14 openings. The detailed notification was published at ECHS Official Website. Candidates who meet the age criteria of maximum 66 years for Medical Officer and maximum 53/56 years for other posts and hold qualifications such as MBBS, Graduate, Class I Clerical Trade, 10+2 with Science, or Diploma in Dental Hygienist/Dental Mechanic Course can now submit their offline applications up to 02 June 2026. vacancy_details.Post Name: Professor, Anesthesiology with Surgical Super Specialty
Assistant Professor, Anesthesiology with Surgical Super Specialty

salary_details.pay_scale: Professor: Rs. 2,60,226/-, Associate Professor: Rs. 1,73,045/-, Assistant Professor: Rs. 1,48,669/-
salary_details.details: Professor: Rs. 2,60,226/- Associate Professor: Rs. 1,73,045/- Assistant Professor: Rs. 1,48,669/-

faq.question: Q1. What is the total number of vacancies for Teaching Faculty posts at ESIC Kolkata?
faq.answer: There are a total of 27 vacancies announced for the Teaching Faculty positions, including Professor, Associate Professor, and Assistant Professor roles in various super specialty departments.

faq.question: Q2. What is the application mode for this ESIC Kolkata recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is a Walk-in Interview. Candidates need to appear directly at the venue on the specified date and time with all necessary documents.

faq.question: Q3. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the Teaching Faculty positions at ESIC Kolkata is scheduled to be held on 28th May 2026.

faq.question: Q4. What is the maximum age limit for the candidates applying for these posts?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all the posts is not exceeding 69 years as of the date of Document Verification and Interview.

faq.question: Q5. What are the salary details for the Professor, Associate Professor, and Assistant Professor posts?
faq.answer: The salary for Professor is Rs. 2,60,226/-, for Associate Professor is Rs. 1,73,045/-, and for Assistant Professor is Rs. 1,48,669/-.

faq.question: Q6. Where will the walk-in interview be conducted?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be conducted at ESIC Kolkata, located at Joka, Kolkata, West Bengal, PIN 700104.

faq.question: Q7. What are the eligibility criteria for the Teaching Faculty posts?
faq.answer: The eligibility criteria are as per the latest guidelines of the National Medical Commission (NMC) vide Gazette notification no. CG-DL-E-05072025-264399 dated 30.06.2025 (Table C & Table D).

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee for SC/ST candidates?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee for SC/ST candidates, as well as for Regular ESIC Candidates, Female Candidates, and Ex-Servicemen.

faq.question: Q9. What documents should candidates bring for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates should bring all original documents, one set of self-attested photocopies, ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if any), and category certificates (if applicable).

faq.question: Q10. What is the reporting time for document verification?
faq.answer: The reporting time for document verification is from 09:30 AM to 10:30 AM on the day of the walk-in interview.
